allow: PowerShell($pid_old = Get-Content "c:\\Users\\timvi\\Desktop\\Polymarket\\arbbot.pid" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "PID в файле: $pid_old"; if \($pid_old\) { $p = Get-Process -Id $pid_old -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { Write-Output "Процесс ЖИВ: $\($p.ProcessName\)" } else { Write-Output "Процесс не запущен \(мёртвый pid-файл\)" } })

PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\timvi\\Desktop\\Polymarket"; Stop-Process -Id 13820 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Remove-Item arbbot.out -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "arb_bot.py" -WorkingDirectory "c:\\Users\\timvi\\Desktop\\Polymarket" -RedirectStandardOutput "arbbot.out" -RedirectStandardError "arbbot.err" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Set-Content -Path "arbbot.pid" -Value $proc.Id; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; if \(Get-Process -Id $proc.Id -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { Write-Output "Бот запущен, PID=$\($proc.Id\)" } else { Write-Output "Бот УПАЛ"; Get-Content arbbot.err -Tail 15 }; Get-Content arbbot.out -Tail 6)

PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\timvi\\Desktop\\Polymarket"; Get-Content arbbot.out -Head 8; Write-Output "..."; Start-Sleep -Seconds 30; \($\(Get-Content arbbot.out\) | Select-String "\\[status\\]" | Select-Object -Last 1\).Line)
